hero.subtitle: Cottages & Villas · Candidasa, East Bali
hero.imageAlt: Aerial view of Orlowsky Discovery Hotel pool and ocean in Candidasa, Bali

welcome.label: Welcome
welcome.heading: A Hidden Gem in East Bali
welcome.description: Nestled along the tranquil coast of Candidasa, Orlowsky Discovery Hotel offers an intimate escape where Balinese charm meets modern comfort. Wake up to ocean breezes, explore vibrant coral reefs, and unwind in our tropical gardens — far from the crowds, close to paradise.
welcome.imageAlt: Tropical garden and pool area of the hotel at sunset

roomsPreview.label: Accommodations
roomsPreview.heading: Rooms & Villas
roomsPreview.subtext: From garden-view cottages to oceanfront villas, each space is designed for relaxation.

rooms.title: Deluxe Cottage
rooms.description: Charming cottage with tropical garden views and modern Balinese comforts
rooms.imageAlt: Deluxe Cottage at Orlowsky Discovery Hotel

rooms.title: Three Bedrooms Pool Villa
rooms.description: Spacious private villa with three bedrooms and your own pool, perfect for families or groups
rooms.imageAlt: Three Bedrooms Pool Villa at Orlowsky Discovery Hotel

items.title: Restaurant
items.description: Indonesian and international cuisine with ocean views

items.title: Spa & Yoga
items.description: Traditional Balinese treatments and daily yoga sessions

items.title: Swimming Pool
items.description: Oceanfront infinity pool surrounded by tropical gardens

experiences.label: Experiences
experiences.heading: Discover East Bali
experiences.subtext: Curated adventures to make your stay unforgettable.

items.title: Excursion Programs
items.description: Explore temples, rice terraces, and hidden waterfalls
items.imageAlt: Bali rice terraces with lush green landscape

items.title: Diving & Snorkeling
items.description: Discover vibrant coral reefs and the famous USAT Liberty shipwreck
items.imageAlt: Colorful coral reef underwater in Bali

items.title: Events & Celebrations
items.description: Weddings, anniversaries, and private events in a tropical setting
items.imageAlt: Elegant outdoor event setup with ocean backdrop

items.title: Car & Bike Rental
items.description: Freedom to explore Bali at your own pace
items.imageAlt: Scooter parked on scenic Bali road

offers.title: Honeymoon Package
